raw.title: Key outcomes from the first summit on ‘transitioning away’ from fossil fuels
raw.excerpt: Countries attending a first-of-its-kind summit have walked away with plans to develop national roadmaps away from fossil fuels, along with new tools to address harmful subsidies and carbon-intensive trade.

llm_processed.summary: The first conference on transitioning away from fossil fuels aimed to facilitate practical discussions on moving away from coal, oil, and gas.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: This could lead to the development of more effective transition strategies and community-led initiatives.
